# DispatchSourceUserDataOr

**Protocol**

A dispatch source that coalesces data you provide using an OR operation.

## Declaration

```swift
protocol DispatchSourceUserDataOr : DispatchSourceProtocol, Sendable
```

## Overview

You do not adopt this protocol in your objects. Instead, use the [doc://com.apple.dispatch/documentation/Dispatch/DispatchSource/makeUserDataOrSource(queue:)] method to create an object that adopts this protocol.

To add custom data to the dispatch source, call the [doc://com.apple.dispatch/documentation/Dispatch/DispatchSourceUserDataOr/or(data:)] method.

## Getting the Event Data

- **or(data:)**

## Creating a Custom Source

- **makeUserDataAddSource(queue:)**: Creates a new dispatch source object that you use to coalesce custom app data using an AND operator.
- **makeUserDataOrSource(queue:)**: Creates a new dispatch source object that you use to coalesce custom app data using an OR operator.
- **makeUserDataReplaceSource(queue:)**: Creates a new dispatch source object that you use to track custom app data.
- **DispatchSourceUserDataAdd**: A dispatch source that coalesces data you provide using an AND operation.
- **DispatchSourceUserDataReplace**: A dispatch source that replaces any pending data with the new value you provide.

## Inherits From

- DispatchSourceProtocol
- NSObjectProtocol
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype

## Conforming Types

- DispatchSource
